---
title: CHAOSS Weekly Newsletter
author:
  - CHAOSS Community
type: post
date: 2019-07-18T20:18:08+00:00
excerpt: 'The candidate metric comment period is coming to an end very soon. Thanks for the discussion and comments. The latest push of work has been on standardizing (or at least creating consistency) in the candidate metric headings. May not sound terribly exciting but it’s good work. '
url: /chaoss-weekly-newsletter-2-2/
nectar_blog_post_view_count:
  - 2509
ppma_authors_name:
  - CHAOSS Community
categories:
  - News

---
